feat.name: Deific Font
feat.text: Your life force can fuel the stuff of miracles. You become drained 1 or increase the value of your drained condition by 1 if you already have the drained condition. Before the end of your next turn, if you Cast a Spell of 4th rank or lower, you don’t expend the spell’s slot when you cast it, or if you cast a focus spell, it does not cost a Focus Point. The spell loses whatever tradition trait it would normally have and gains the divine

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.
